name: Dime Commercial Bancshares, Inc. /NY/
business: Dime Community Bancshares, Inc. is a bank holding company that provides commercial banking and financial services through its wholly-owned subsidiary, Dime Community Bank. The Bank offers full service commercial and consumer banking services, including accepting deposits and making loans, and also provides title insurance brokerage through Dime Abstract LLC. Its customer base is principally comprised of small and medium sized businesses, municipal relationships, and consumer relationships in Greater Long Island, New York City, Westchester County, and New Jersey.

exposures.sentence: breaches or failures of the company’s information technology security systems;
